facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 1,712 reviews. At a café on Trần Hưng Đạo.

Cafe Green(카페그린) in Dương Đông is not flying under the radar. The mango bingsu alone earns the trip. Shaved ice, fresh Phu Quoc mango, cold and heavy enough to split two ways.

If your café checklist doesn't have this on it yet, fix that.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch this mango bingsu land on the table at Cafe Green(카페그린). Phu Quoc mango, shaved ice, 4.9 stars from 1,712 people who already know. First spoonful explains everything.
